positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition of bioluminescent fantasy flora and fauna. The scene features glowing, abstract crystal flowers, intricate vine structures, and ethereal butterflies flying around a central, geometric knot point. Use a deep indigo and vibrant turquoise color palette, highlighted by neon emerald glow accents. The overall style should be neo-psychedelic botanical illustration meets Art Deco design, printed on a solid background. Focus on clean silhouettes, hard edges, perfect symmetry, and maximum contrast, suitable for high-quality apparel printing. Intricate details, vector art look, cinematic composition.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, noisy, lowres, watermark, text, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, messy, abstract, graffiti
